data.title: Ethereum establishes security team, plans biweekly quantum-resistant meetings; Foundation allocates $2M for stronger cryptography.
data.description: Developers of Ethereum will be introducing biweekly sessions to focus on creating transactions that are resistant to quantum computing. The Ethereum Foundation has pledged $2 million in additional funding towards enhancing the security of core cryptography in response to the threat posed by quantum technologies. These efforts underline the commitment of Ethereum to staying ahead of potential vulnerabilities and ensuring the longevity and security of its ecosystem.

data.title: By February 2026, BCH expected to reach $720-750. Short-term target: $610-620, bullish breakout at $607, critical support at $580.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Predictions: In the short term, the target price for Bitcoin Cash (BCH) is estimated to be between $610 and $620 within a week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast indicates a range of $720 to $750 over the course of a month. The level for a bullish breakout is set at $607, while a critical support level stands at $580. These figures provide insights into the potential trajectory of BCH in the near future.

data.title: Abitibi Metals reports 12.83% CuEq at B26, high-grade zone growing.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 24, 2026, Abitibi Metals Corp. announced a significant development in their exploration efforts. The company, listed on the CSE as AMQ, OTCQB as AMQFF, and FSE as FW0, revealed a recent high-grade copper-gold discovery from their Phase 3 drilling initiative at the B26 Polymetallic Deposit in Québec. This finding adds to their series of successful results and showcases their continued progress in the region.

data.title: UNI is trading at $4.88, aiming for $6.29 breakout, supported at $4.66. Expected 29% increase.
data.description: Uniswap's cryptocurrency, UNI, is currently trading at $4.88 amid bearish momentum. Despite this, oversold conditions indicate the possibility of a 29% increase to reach the $6.29 resistance level if the $4.66 support level is maintained throughout February.

data.title: AVAX may hit $12.49 by Jan 25 despite $11.69 support. Bearish trend at $12.12. Tech analysis indicates mixed signals.
data.description: A cryptocurrency known as Avalanche (AVAX) is currently at a key level of support at $11.69, as technical analysts are aiming for a target of $12.49 by January 25. However, there is still a bearish trend present as the price hovers around $12.12.

data.title: LINK may reach $14.50 by early Feb, with current resistance at $12.71. Analysts aim for $14.50-$15.00 in a week from oversold levels at $12.22.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink (LINK) is currently facing a crucial challenge as it nears the resistance level of $12.71. Analysts are aiming for price targets between $14.50 and $15.00 in the upcoming week. The coin's oversold status at its current level of $12.22 could potentially lead to a price rebound.

data.title: Analysts foresee MATIC rebounding to $0.45-$0.52 by early March 2026 from oversold $0.38, despite bearish trends.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) has been identified as oversold at a price point of $0.38. Analysts have set price targets for MATIC at $0.45-$0.52 to be achieved within the next 4-6 weeks. However, there is ongoing bearish momentum in the market that is approaching critical support levels.

data.title: Polkadot price aiming for $2.48 resistance by month-end, currently trading at $1.93. Mixed technical signals ahead.
data.description: Polkadot is currently valued at $1.93 in the market, and analysts are aiming for a resistance level of $2.48 by the end of January. Technical analysis reveals a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 42.91, indicating a balanced sentiment. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows bearish momentum, leading to a mixed outlook on the cryptocurrency's future performance.

data.title: SOL price expected to hit $142-150 in Feb if it breaks $132 resistance. Currently at $127.63 with RSI at 41.38.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Solana is currently trading at a price of $127.63, while its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral level of 41.38. Analysts suggest that if Solana manages to surpass the resistance level of $132 in the next 2-4 weeks, it could potentially reach targets between $142 and $150 based on technical analysis.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.43 resistance with current price at $0.36, despite bearish MACD signal.
data.description: The forecast for ADA anticipates Cardano trading at $0.36, indicating a potential challenge of the upper Bollinger Band at $0.43 according to technical indicators. However, the bearish MACD signal advises caution moving forward.

data.title: BNB's price could reach $970 by January 31st, envisioning an 8.6% surge from current levels, supported by the technical recovery. Key resistance is at $915.

Analyzing the technical aspects, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 41.75, indicating a neutral stance. Additionally, a significant resistance level is identified at $2.00, marking a crucial juncture for decision-making.

data.title: Hotel101 plans to raise up to USD 300 million with convertible preferred shares to aid global expansion in prop-tech business.
data.description: The upcoming capital raise, anticipated to be significant, will provide essential support for the prop-tech, asset-light HBNB business model as it advances towards its next phase of global expansion.

data.title: GameStop shifts entire Bitcoin holdings, possibly considering sale & facing a $76 million loss on their 4,710 Bitcoin.
data.description: Selling GameStop's 4,710 Bitcoin at current rates would result in a potential $76 million loss since they were purchased at an average price of $107,900 each.

data.title: Eric Trump claims World Liberty Financial's stablecoin USD1 has surpassed PayPal's PYUSD, calling it a "major milestone".
data.description: Eric Trump announced that USD1, World Liberty Financial's stablecoin, has surpassed PayPal Holdings Inc.'s PYUSD stablecoin in size, marking a significant milestone in an online post. He emphasized the growth of USD1, stating that it is becoming one of the leading digital dollar platforms globally. Trump highlighted the importance of this achievement in shaping the future of global currency, not just limited to cryptocurrencies. The news was shared on January 23, 2026, with more details accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chinese electric SUV, GAC AION V, wins global recognition in 2025 with prestigious awards and top safety ratings.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, as of January 23, 2026, the GAC AION V has been receiving widespread recognition worldwide. Throughout 2025, this premium electric SUV has earned multiple prestigious awards and top safety ratings. This success highlights its competitive strength in the global market.

data.title: Democrats propose ethics-related amendments to bill on crypto market structure, aiming to stop US officials from profiting from crypto.
data.description: The recent changes represent the most recent effort by the Democratic Party to prevent American government officials from benefiting from cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Apple lead earnings wave after market turbulence from President Trump; follow for guidance.
data.description: Four major companies, Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Apple, are at the forefront of a surge in earnings following a period of volatile market activity influenced by President Trump. The stock market experienced a back-and-forth movement before these companies took the lead in reporting their financial results. Dow Jones Futures indicate a positive outlook as investors await the earnings reports from these tech giants. The market is closely watching the financial performance of these companies amid the current economic landscape.
